scenario: Rails work session - audit the query Relation contract before a rework

steps.name: Map the Relation contract and what it is built on
Trace how a query is built up and executed
Audit every dependent of the Relation contract
Trace how relation behavior is reused for associations
Assess the blast radius of the contract change
